overview.tagline: A hardworking, family-oriented borough with strong roots and quick NYC access
overview.description: North Arlington is a densely populated borough in southern Bergen County with a proud blue-collar heritage and a strong sense of community. Bordered by the Passaic River and the Meadowlands, the borough offers residents practical benefits including some of the shortest commutes to New York City in Bergen County. North Arlington has a diverse population with significant Irish-American, Italian-American, and growing Latino communities. The borough features an active downtown along Ridge Road and is home to multiple parks and recreational facilities.
highlights: One of the shortest commutes to NYC in Bergen County
Strong community heritage and civic pride
Affordable housing with good value for location
Proximity to Meadowlands sports and entertainment

realEstate.assessmentInfo: Properties are assessed by the Borough Tax Assessor. North Arlington has seen significant redevelopment in recent years, particularly near the Meadowlands and along Ridge Road.
realEstate.recentTrends: North Arlington's real estate market has benefited from its proximity to NYC and competitive pricing compared to neighboring communities. New development projects have added modern housing options. The market has seen strong appreciation, particularly for renovated homes and new construction.
neighborhoodNotes: Ridge Road corridor — Close to shops, restaurants, and bus routes
Porete Avenue area — Near the Meadowlands with newer development
Canterbury Avenue — Established residential neighborhood with single-family homes
Sunset Avenue area — Quiet streets near the Lyndhurst border
Schuyler Avenue section — Mix of single-family and multi-family housing near transit

trashCollection.title: Trash Collection
trashCollection.description: Curbside trash collection is provided by the Borough's contracted hauler.
details: Trash pickup occurs twice per week
Containers must be placed at curbside by 6:00 AM on collection day
Maximum 50 lbs per container with secure lids
Bulk item pickup scheduled through the DPW
Holiday schedule adjustments posted on borough website

recycling.title: Recycling
recycling.description: Recycling is collected on a regular schedule by the Borough.
details: Commingled recyclables collected biweekly
Paper and cardboard collected on alternate weeks
Recycling bins provided by the Borough
Yard waste collected seasonally
Electronics recycling events held periodically

waterSewer.title: Water & Sewer
waterSewer.description: Water is supplied by Passaic Valley Water Commission. Sewer service is through the Bergen County Utilities Authority.
details: Passaic Valley Water Commission provides water supply
Sewer service through Bergen County Utilities Authority (BCUA)
Water billing handled by Passaic Valley Water Commission
Annual water quality reports available
Emergency water line issues available 24/7

permits.title: Building & Permits
permits.description: The Building Department handles construction permits, zoning, and code enforcement.
details: Permits required for construction, renovations, and additions
Zoning Board of Adjustment meets monthly
Permit applications available at Borough Hall
Inspections scheduled through the Building Department
Certificate of occupancy required for new construction

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: Parking regulations are enforced on borough streets and municipal lots.
details: Municipal parking lots available near Ridge Road
Street parking subject to posted restrictions and meter times
Commuter parking available near bus stops
Overnight parking restrictions enforced
Snow emergency parking rules in effect during storms

additionalServices.title: North Arlington Public Library
additionalServices.description: Public library serving the community with books, programs, and technology.
details: Located at 210 Ridge Road
Children's programs, teen events, and adult programming
Free Wi-Fi and computer access
Part of the Bergen County Cooperative Library System (BCCLS)

additionalServices.title: Recreation Department
additionalServices.description: Year-round recreational programs for residents of all ages.
details: Youth sports leagues and summer recreation programs
Senior citizen programs and activities
Community events and holiday celebrations
Park facilities and playing fields

noise.title: Noise Ordinance
noise.summary: North Arlington enforces noise regulations to maintain quality of life in residential neighborhoods.
keyRules: Construction noise prohibited before 7:00 AM and after 8:00 PM weekdays
Saturday construction 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
No construction on Sundays or holidays
Loud music and parties subject to limits after 10:00 PM
Power equipment and leaf blowers restricted to daytime hours

propertyMaintenance.title: Property Maintenance
propertyMaintenance.summary: All properties must be maintained to borough standards.
keyRules: Lawns must be mowed and maintained regularly
Properties must be free of debris, junk, and abandoned vehicles
Structures and fences must be kept in good repair
Sidewalks must be cleared of snow within 24 hours after a storm
Property owners responsible for maintaining curb appeal

pets.title: Pet Regulations
pets.summary: Pet ownership is subject to licensing, leash, and cleanup requirements.
keyRules: Dogs must be licensed annually with the Borough Clerk
All dogs must be leashed when off owner's property
Pet waste must be picked up immediately
Excessive barking is subject to complaints and fines
Pit bull and other breed restrictions may apply per borough ordinance

parking.title: Parking Regulations
parking.summary: Parking rules are strictly enforced throughout the borough.
keyRules: No overnight parking on streets from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM
Alternate-side parking enforced for street sweeping
Vehicles must be moved during snow emergencies
No parking within 25 feet of stop signs or fire hydrants
Commercial vehicles over 10,000 lbs restricted from residential streets

rentals.title: Rental Property Regulations
rentals.summary: Rental properties must be registered and maintained to code standards.
keyRules: Rental properties must be registered with the Borough
Certificate of habitability required before new tenants move in
Annual registration and inspection required
Landlords responsible for all maintenance and code compliance
Multi-family properties subject to fire safety inspections

other.title: Garage Sales
other.summary: Garage and yard sales are permitted with restrictions.
keyRules: Permit required from the Borough Clerk for garage sales
Limited to a maximum number of sales per year
Sales must be held during daylight hours
Signs must be removed after the sale

publicSchools.name: North Arlington Middle School
publicSchools.notes: Middle school with a diverse student body

publicSchools.name: North Arlington High School
publicSchools.notes: Comprehensive high school known as the Vikings; offers a range of academic and vocational programs

privateSchools.name: Queen of Peace Elementary School
privateSchools.notes: Catholic school affiliated with Queen of Peace parish

privateSchools.name: Queen of Peace High School
privateSchools.notes: Catholic high school (closed in 2020; noted for historical significance)

nearbyHigherEd: New Jersey Institute of Technology (Newark) — 8 miles

whyMoveHere: Affordable housing with short commute times to NYC
Strong community identity with active civic organizations
Good highway access to NJ Turnpike, Routes 17 and 21
Close to Meadowlands entertainment and sports venues

commuteToNYC.duration: 25-45 minutes to Port Authority or Midtown
commuteToNYC.notes: North Arlington offers one of the best commute positions in Bergen County. NJ Transit bus routes run along Ridge Road to the Port Authority Bus Terminal. The NJ Turnpike and Route 21 provide direct driving access to the Lincoln Tunnel and Holland Tunnel. Newark Penn Station and the PATH system are also accessible for Midtown and Downtown NYC connections.

costOfLiving.summary: North Arlington is one of the more affordable communities in Bergen County, offering solid value for its proximity to New York City.
costOfLiving.vsStateAverage: Near the state average for housing costs
costOfLiving.vsNationalAverage: Above the national average, mainly due to property taxes and housing

pros: Excellent commute to NYC — one of the shortest in Bergen County
Affordable housing with good value for location
Active commercial district on Ridge Road
Strong community spirit and civic engagement
cons: Higher population density than many Bergen County towns
Some areas are close to industrial zones and the Turnpike
Limited green space compared to northern Bergen County
Street parking can be competitive in denser neighborhoods
School ratings are average compared to wealthier Bergen County districts

restaurants.name: Arlington Diner
restaurants.description: Classic New Jersey diner serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner with generous portions.

restaurants.name: Bel Paese Restaurant
restaurants.description: Traditional Italian restaurant with homemade pasta, veal, and seafood dishes.

restaurants.name: River Road Hot Dogs
restaurants.description: Iconic roadside stand serving classic New Jersey hot dogs and burgers.

restaurants.name: La Sicilia
restaurants.description: Italian bakery and deli offering fresh bread, pastries, and prepared Italian foods.

restaurants.name: My Way Lounge
restaurants.description: Neighborhood bar and grill with pub fare, wings, and a friendly local atmosphere.

parks.name: North Arlington Recreation Complex
parks.description: Major recreation facility with sports fields, playground, and community gathering spaces.

parks.name: Riverview Park
parks.description: Park along the Passaic River with walking paths and scenic river views.

parks.name: Allan C. Hewitson Memorial Park
parks.description: Neighborhood park with playground equipment and open space for families.

events.name: North Arlington Street Fair
events.description: Annual street fair along Ridge Road featuring vendors, food, live music, and family entertainment.

events.name: Memorial Day Parade
events.description: Community parade along Ridge Road honoring veterans with marching bands and civic groups.

events.name: Holiday Tree Lighting
events.description: Annual ceremony marking the start of the holiday season with tree lighting and community celebration.

attractions.name: Ridge Road Shopping District
attractions.description: Borough's main commercial corridor with a mix of local shops, restaurants, and services.

attractions.name: MetLife Stadium (nearby)
attractions.description: Home of the NFL's Giants and Jets in the Meadowlands, just minutes from North Arlington.
attractions.address: 1 MetLife Stadium Drive, East Rutherford, NJ

attractions.name: American Dream Mall (nearby)
attractions.description: Major entertainment and retail destination featuring a water park, amusement park, and shopping.
attractions.address: 1 American Dream Way, East Rutherford, NJ

government.meetingSchedule: Borough Council meets on the second and fourth Thursday of each month at 7:00 PM
government.meetingLocation: North Arlington Borough Hall, 214 Ridge Road
